creator: DougB@gorean.org
text:
Note to gnats-admin, PR 22517 is missing according to edit-pr on
 freefall, but I can see it in my local copy of the repo.
 
 Nils M Holm wrote:
 
 > Having just learned from the 4.1 handbook that an inappropriate subject
 > line may imply that a PR is ignored, I'm sending this message. Please
 > have a look at
 > 
 > ports/22047, ports/22048. These are in fact new ports.
 
 	I updated the subjects and synopses for those two PR's, however even a
 cursory examination shows numerous violations of our standard porting
 style. 
  
 > Unfortunately, the 3.3 handbook does not provide any hints regarding
 > good subject lines for PRs.
 
 	Please read the shiny new porter's handbook at
 http://www.freebsd.org/porters-handbook/ and resubmit your ports as
 followups to the original PR's. Don't get discouraged, it just takes
 time to get things right with any new project. :)
 
 Good luck,
 
 Doug
